description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized humanoid figure with exaggerated features, including a large, elongated conical headdress and prominent, round eyes. The figure is seated with its knees drawn up and arms crossed over its chest, giving it a compact and contemplative posture. The surface is matte and appears to be made of weathered stone or ceramic, with a mottled coloration of earthy browns and greens. The facial expression is somewhat abstract, with a wide mouth and simplified anatomical details. The back of the figure is smooth and rounded, with the headdress forming a continuous curve from the head. The overall form is monolithic and solid, suggesting a single-piece construction.
description: A seated humanoid figure with a tall conical headdress, crossed arms, and stylized facial features, rendered in mottled brown and green stone or ceramic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated headdress, bent knees, and arms crossed tightly over the chest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, rounded back and the full height of the headdress.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the headdress and the compact, seated posture with visible facial profile.
description_view_3: Frontal view displaying the large, round eyes, wide mouth, and the crossed arms resting on the knees.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized seated human figure with conical headdress
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
